scripts.build:vendor: cd vendor/react-timeline-editor && YARN_NPM_REGISTRY_SERVER=https://registry.npmmirror.com YARN_HTTP_TIMEOUT=120000 node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.9.2.cjs install && YARN_NPM_REGISTRY_SERVER=https://registry.npmmirror.com YARN_HTTP_TIMEOUT=120000 node .yarn/releases/yarn-4.9.2.cjs build && node ../../scripts/post-vendor-dist.cjs
